item.text: I’m syncing the authoritative task summary into the checkpoint file and then I’ll emit the final structured result with all task records preserved.

{
  "output": "Implemented the approved plan and captured execution evidence; full-suite green verification remains blocked by unrelated out-of-scope test failures.",
  "files_changed": [
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/usePresetAutoSelect.ts",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.ts",

    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.test.tsx",

    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/ui/Header.test.tsx",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/sections/generation/BatchModeContent.test.tsx",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx",
    "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/hooks/timeline-core/useTimelineOrchestrator.hook.test.tsx",
    ".megaplan/plans/refactor-the-phase-config-20260414-0017/execution_checkpoint.json"
  ],
  "commands_run": [
    "rg -n \"rebuildPhaseConfig\\\\(\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
    "rg -n \"handleGenerationTypeModeChange|selectedPhasePresetId: null|selectedPhasePresetId: defaultPresetId|phaseConfig: basicConfig.phaseConfig|handleRestoreDefaults\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
    "rg -n \"generationTypeMode|prevGenerationTypeModeRef|modeChanged|hasStructureVideo|phaseConfig\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/usePresetAutoSelect.ts",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.test.tsx",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/MotionControl.test.tsx",
    "rg -n \"updateField\\\\('generationTypeMode'|onGenerationTypeModeChange: handleGenerationTypeModeChange|onPhasePresetSelect: handlePhasePresetSelect|onPhasePresetRemove: handlePhasePresetRemove|onPhaseConfigChange: handlePhaseConfigChange\" src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx",
    "rg -n \"rebuildPhaseConfig\\\\(|force:\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.test.tsx src/tools/travel-between-images/components/MotionControl.test.tsx",
    "./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit",
    "node /tmp/phase_config_dual_writer_repro.js",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images",
    "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose"
  ],
  "deviations": [
    "T5 needed additional scoped test updates in `Header.test.tsx`, `BatchModeContent.test.tsx`, `useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx`, and `useTimelineOrchestrator.hook.test.tsx` because the current repository state had stale expectations and mocks inside the travel-between-images verification surface.",
    "The required full Vitest rerun surfaced failures outside the approved refactor boundary, including `useTasksPaneController.test.ts`, `PanesContext.test.tsx`, `useDeleteGenerationAction.test.ts`, `GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`, `taskCreation.test.ts`, `taskParamContract.test.ts`, `AppProviders.test.tsx`, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`; those were left unchanged to avoid unrelated scope creep, so T5 is reported as skipped rather than done.",
    "The requested checkpoint file did not exist, so it was created at `.megaplan/plans/refactor-the-phase-config-20260414-0017/execution_checkpoint.json` with the current task and sense-check state."
  ],
  "task_updates": [
    {
      "task_id": "T1",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Verified that `handleGenerationTypeModeChange` now computes the builtin phase config inline and writes `generationTypeMode`, `selectedPhasePresetId`, `phaseConfig`, and model frame substate in one `updateFields` call for both branches. Basic mode sets the mode default preset ID, advanced mode explicitly clears it to `null`, and `handleRestoreDefaults` now updates preset ID plus `phaseConfig` atomically. The forced `rebuildPhaseConfig` call on mode switch was removed.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "rg -n \"rebuildPhaseConfig\\\\(\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
        "rg -n \"handleGenerationTypeModeChange|selectedPhasePresetId: null|selectedPhasePresetId: defaultPresetId|phaseConfig: basicConfig.phaseConfig|handleRestoreDefaults\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T2",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Verified that `usePresetAutoSelect` now only resets on settings loading and auto-selects the builtin default on initial mount or shot navigation when a basic-mode shot has no preset selected. Previous-mode tracking and mode-change auto-select logic were removed, and the hook signature cleanup was propagated through `useMotionControlPresetState` and `MotionControl`. Scoped vitest passed for the motion preset hook and `MotionControl`.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/usePresetAutoSelect.ts",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.ts",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/MotionControl.tsx",

        "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/MotionControl.test.tsx"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T3",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Verified that `VideoGenerationModalSections` now uses provider-backed `handleGenerationTypeModeChange`, `handlePhasePresetSelect`, `handlePhasePresetRemove`, and `handlePhaseConfigChange` instead of raw `updateField` calls for those paths. The modal sections test was updated to assert the provider handlers are invoked from both `BatchSettingsForm` and `MotionControl` surfaces.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx"
      ],

        "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T4",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Confirmed `rebuildPhaseConfig` is now called only from `handleAmountOfMotionChange` and `handleSelectedLorasChange`, which are basic-mode-only incremental sync paths and do not reintroduce the dual-writer problem. Removed the unused `force` parameter and stale comments from the helper, then reran the related motion/preset modal test modules.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "rg -n \"rebuildPhaseConfig\\\\(|force:\" src/tools/travel-between-images/hooks/settings/useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers.ts",
        "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images/components/VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useMotionControlPresetState.test.tsx src/tools/travel-between-images/components/MotionControl.test.tsx"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T5",
      "status": "skipped",
      "executor_notes": "Verified `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` passes with no type errors. Ran a short temporary repro script against the dual-writer surface; it passed and was deleted after execution. Scoped Vitest for `src/tools/travel-between-images` now passes after updating stale expectations and mocks in `Header.test.tsx`, `BatchModeContent.test.tsx`, `useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx`, and `useTimelineOrchestrator.hook.test.tsx`. The required full `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose` rerun still fails in unrelated suites outside the approved refactor surface, including `useTasksPaneController.test.ts`, `PanesContext.test.tsx`, `useDeleteGenerationAction.test.ts`, `GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`, `taskCreation.test.ts`, `taskParamContract.test.ts`, `AppProviders.test.tsx`, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`, so branch-wide green verification remains blocked by non-scope failures.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/ui/Header.test.tsx",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/sections/generation/BatchModeContent.test.tsx",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/hooks/useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx",
        "src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/hooks/timeline-core/useTimelineOrchestrator.hook.test.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit",
        "node /tmp/phase_config_dual_writer_repro.js",
        "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose src/tools/travel-between-images",
        "./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --reporter=verbose"
      ]

  "sense_check_acknowledgments": [
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC1",
      "executor_note": "Confirmed in `useVideoTravelSettingsHandlers` that the basic-mode branch writes `generationTypeMode`, `selectedPhasePresetId`, and `phaseConfig` in the same `updateFields` call, and the trailing mode-change `rebuildPhaseConfig` call is gone."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC2",
      "executor_note": "Confirmed the advanced-mode branch writes `selectedPhasePresetId: null` together with `generationTypeMode` and `phaseConfig`, and `handleRestoreDefaults` now performs a single atomic `updateFields` write."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC3",
      "executor_note": "Confirmed `usePresetAutoSelect` no longer contains `prevGenerationTypeModeRef`, `prevHasStructureVideoRef`, or `modeChanged` logic. The initial mount and shot-navigation auto-select path remains, and the preserved integration is covered by the scoped motion preset hook test."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC4",
      "executor_note": "Confirmed `VideoGenerationModalSections` routes generation-type changes, preset select/remove, and phase-config edits through provider handlers. The updated modal sections test asserts those provider handlers are called."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC5",
      "executor_note": "Confirmed `tsc --noEmit` passes and the scoped travel-between-images suite now passes cleanly. The required full Vitest rerun did not pass because of unrelated existing failures outside the refactor surface, so branch-wide green verification is still blocked."
